/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/installer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/uninstaller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/file_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/header_reader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/desktop_integration.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/script_runner.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/home/ruanjian/workspace/project/apppack/common/file_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/app-installer.dir/home/ruanjian/workspace/project/apppack/common/compressor.cpp.o" -o app-installer  -lzstd
